name: Stir-Fried Lobster with Ginger Sauce - Pad Go
recipeIngredient: 1/4 cup Sliced Green Jalapeno Peppers (Prik Chee Fa)
1/2 cup Chopped Green Onions, Scallions, Spring Onions
recipeInstructions:
1. The lobster in the southern part of Thailand is considered a large shrimp and is therefore called goong mang-gorn - dragon shrimp.
2. Scrub the lobster clean and separate into large 2-inch pieces. Cut the tail into individual sections.
3. Heat a large skillet on high and add the oil. Add all the remaining ingredients except the lobster and stir-fry for 30 seconds.
4. Add the lobster pieces to the skillet, cover, and steam on medium-high heat for 2 more minutes.
5. Remove to a platter and serve.
